segments.caption: The video opens with the PBS Digital Studios logo, transitioning to a breathtaking view of Earth from space, showcasing its curvature and atmospheric glow. A man in a denim shirt and beige pants appears, standing against a dark textured background, gesturing expressively as he speaks. The scene cuts to a lioness walking through a savanna, followed by a pterosaur flying over a lush forest, then back to the man continuing his narration. The video then displays a layered rock formation, followed by an animated underwater scene with ancient marine creatures like a trilobite and a nautiloid. A timeline of geological eons appears on screen as the man gestures toward it, and the word 'EONS' is displayed over a prehistoric landscape with dinosaurs. The man reappears, now with an inset image of layered sedimentary rock, then with an image of Earth from space, continuing his explanation with hand movements and engaged facial expressions.

discovered_new_entities.Man in Denim Shirt: A man with short hair, wearing a dark denim shirt over a white t-shirt and beige pants, standing against a dark textured background, using expressive hand gestures while speaking.
discovered_new_entities.PBS Digital Studios Logo: A colorful logo with the letters 'PBS' in blue, orange, and green, followed by 'DIGITAL STUDIOS' in gray, sketched-style text.
discovered_new_entities.Earth from Space: A view of Earth from orbit, showing its curvature, blue atmosphere, and cloud patterns against the blackness of space.
discovered_new_entities.Lioness: A tawny lioness walking through dry grassland with mountains in the background.
discovered_new_entities.Pterosaur: A large flying reptile with a long beak and membranous wings, soaring over a dense green forest.
discovered_new_entities.Layered Rock Formation: A cross-section of sedimentary rock with distinct horizontal layers of varying colors and textures.
discovered_new_entities.Underwater Prehistoric Scene: An animated deep-sea environment with ancient marine life, including a trilobite and a nautiloid, among coral-like structures.
discovered_new_entities.Geological Timeline: A vertical timeline listing eons and eras with time ranges: Hadean, Archean, Proterozoic, Paleozoic, Mesozoic, and Cenozoic.
discovered_new_entities.Prehistoric Landscape with Dinosaurs: A misty, ancient forest scene with large dinosaurs, overlaid with the word 'EONS' in bold white letters.
discovered_new_entities.Sedimentary Rock Inset: A close-up image of layered sedimentary rock, shown in a white-bordered frame to the right of the speaker.
discovered_new_entities.Earth Image Inset: A framed image of Earth from space, showing continents and oceans illuminated by sunlight, displayed to the left of the speaker.

segments.caption: The video opens with the Man in Denim Shirt standing against a dark textured background, speaking expressively with his hands clasped. He introduces Nicolas Steno, with an inset image appearing to his right showing a portrait of Steno in clerical attire and a book cover titled 'NICOLAI STENONIS DE SOLIDO INTRA SOLIDUM NATURALITER CONTENTO DISSERTATIONIS PRODROMUS,' labeled 'NICOLAS STENO.' The scene transitions to a close-up of a Layered Rock Formation, with a vertical white line and text labels 'NEWER' at the top and 'OLDER' at the bottom, illustrating the principle of superposition. The speaker returns, gesturing with open hands, then introduces Giovanni Arduino with a black-and-white bust image labeled 'GIOVANNI ARDUINO' and a credit line 'IMAGE FROM ISTITUTO VENETO DI SCIENZE, LETTERE ED ARTI.' A photograph of snow-capped mountains appears, followed by a historical sketch of a geological cross-section with handwritten annotations, overlaid with the words 'PRIMARY,' 'SECONDARY,' 'TERTIARY,' and 'QUATERNARY' in red text. The video then shows a series of real rock formations—first a rugged, layered cliff, then a desert rock face with visible strata, and finally a close-up of a sedimentary rock layer. The speaker reappears, gesturing with his hands, and introduces William Smith with a portrait labeled 'WILLIAM SMITH' to his right. Throughout, the speaker maintains a consistent presence, using hand gestures to emphasize points, while the background remains dark and textured, and the lighting focuses on him and the inset images.

active_entities.Man in Denim Shirt: A man with short hair, wearing a dark denim shirt over a white t-shirt and beige pants, standing against a dark textured background, using expressive hand gestures while speaking.
active_entities.Layered Rock Formation: A cross-section of sedimentary rock with distinct horizontal layers of varying colors and textures.
active_entities.Sedimentary Rock Inset: A close-up image of layered sedimentary rock, shown in a white-bordered frame to the right of the speaker.

discovered_new_entities.Giovanni Arduino Bust: A black-and-white bust image of Giovanni Arduino, labeled 'GIOVANNI ARDUINO,' with a credit line 'IMAGE FROM ISTITUTO VENETO DI SCIENZE, LETTERE ED ARTI'.
discovered_new_entities.Historical Geological Sketch: A hand-drawn geological cross-section with handwritten annotations, overlaid with the red text labels 'PRIMARY,' 'SECONDARY,' 'TERTIARY,' and 'QUATERNARY'.
discovered_new_entities.William Smith Portrait: A portrait of William Smith, an older man with white hair and a dark coat, labeled 'WILLIAM SMITH' to the right of the speaker.
discovered_new_entities.Snow-Capped Mountains Image: A photograph of a mountain range with sharp peaks and snow-covered slopes, shown in a white-bordered frame to the left of the speaker.
discovered_new_entities.Desert Rock Face: A wide shot of a desert rock formation with visible sedimentary layers and sparse vegetation, shown in a white-bordered frame.
discovered_new_entities.Rugged Cliff Formation: A close-up of a steep, layered rock cliff with gray and brown strata, shown in a white-bordered frame.

segments.caption: The video opens with the Man in Denim Shirt standing against a dark textured background, speaking directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures. As he speaks, a series of images appear to his side: first, a framed illustration of various fossilized shells and marine organisms, followed by a vertical stack of three fossil images—trilobites, ammonites, and another trilobite—each separated by dotted lines. The scene transitions to close-up images of ancient rocks: a 4.03 billion-year-old gneiss sample from Canada, followed by a 3.8 billion-year-old supracrustal rock from Greenland, both labeled with credits and age information. The speaker reappears, now with portraits of Nicolas Steno, Giovanni Arduino, and William Smith displayed to his right, labeled with their names. The text 'GEOLOGIC TIME SCALE' appears below the portraits. The video then shifts to a full-screen animated timeline, showing horizontal bars labeled 'EONS', 'ERAS', 'PERIODS', 'EPOCHS', and 'AGES', progressing from 4.6 billion years ago to the present day, with each division color-coded. The speaker returns, gesturing as he explains, with the timeline now shown in a smaller inset to his right. The overall tone is educational, with a focus on geological history and the development of the geologic time scale.

active_entities.Man in Denim Shirt: A man with short hair, wearing a dark denim shirt over a white t-shirt, standing against a dark textured background, using expressive hand gestures while speaking.
active_entities.Nicolas Steno Portrait: A historical portrait of Nicolas Steno in clerical attire, holding a cross, labeled 'NICOLAS STENO'.
active_entities.Giovanni Arduino Bust: A black-and-white bust image of Giovanni Arduino, labeled 'GIOVANNI ARDUINO'.
active_entities.William Smith Portrait: A portrait of William Smith, an older man with white hair and a dark coat, labeled 'WILLIAM SMITH'.
active_entities.Geological Timeline: A full-screen animated timeline with horizontal bars labeled 'EONS', 'ERAS', 'PERIODS', 'EPOCHS', and 'AGES', color-coded and spanning from 4.6 billion years ago to the present day.

discovered_new_entities.Fossil Illustration: A framed illustration showing various fossilized shells and marine organisms, including a nautiloid, brachiopod, and trilobite, displayed to the left of the speaker.
discovered_new_entities.Fossil Images Stack: A vertical stack of three fossil images—trilobites, ammonites, and another trilobite—each in a white-bordered frame, separated by dotted lines, shown to the right of the speaker.
discovered_new_entities.4.03 Billion Year Old Gneiss Sample: A close-up image of a dark, layered rock with yellowish veins, labeled '4.03 BILLION YEAR OLD SAMPLE OF GNEISS FROM CANADA' with credit to Mike Beauregard.
discovered_new_entities.3.8 Billion Year Old Supracrustal Rock: A greenish, layered rock sample with white and dark green bands, labeled 'SUPRACRUSTAL ROCK FROM GREENLAND, DATED 3.8 BILLION YEARS OLD' with credit to James St. John.
discovered_new_entities.Geological Timeline Inset: A smaller version of the geological timeline, shown in a white-bordered frame to the right of the speaker, as he continues to explain.

segments.caption: The video opens with the Man in Denim Shirt standing against a dark textured background, speaking directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures. To his right, a white-bordered inset displays a geological timeline labeled 'EONS' and 'ERAS', color-coded and spanning from 4.6 billion years ago to the present day. The scene transitions to a full-screen version of the timeline, now showing 'PERIODS' and 'EPOCHS' with a more detailed color gradient, as the speaker continues to explain. The video then cuts to a dramatic animated scene labeled 'EONS', depicting a prehistoric underwater environment with ancient marine life like trilobites and nautiloids, overlaid with bold white text. This transitions to a title card for the 'HADEAN EON' (4.6–4 billion years ago), followed by the speaker reappearing, now standing full-body, with a vertical timeline on the left listing the Hadean, Archean, Proterozoic, and Paleozoic eras. The video then shows a series of dramatic visualizations: a molten Earth with glowing lava cracks, a fiery volcanic eruption, and a stormy sky with lightning, all framed in white borders, illustrating the chaotic conditions of the early Earth. The speaker returns, gesturing with open hands to emphasize the scale of the Hadean Eon.

active_entities.Man in Denim Shirt: A man with short hair, wearing a dark denim shirt over a white t-shirt, standing against a dark textured background, using expressive hand gestures while speaking. He appears in multiple segments, sometimes full-body, sometimes mid-shot, consistently engaging with the camera.
active_entities.Geological Timeline: A full-screen animated timeline with horizontal bars labeled 'EONS', 'ERAS', 'PERIODS', 'EPOCHS', and 'AGES', color-coded and spanning from 4.6 billion years ago to the present day. It appears first as an inset, then as a full-screen graphic.

active_entities.Geological Timeline Inset: A smaller version of the geological timeline, shown in a white-bordered frame to the right of the speaker, as he continues to explain the Hadean Eon.
active_entities.Earth from Space: A view of Earth from orbit, showing its curvature, blue atmosphere, and cloud patterns against the blackness of space, used as a background for the Hadean Eon title card.

discovered_new_entities.Volcanic Eruption Image: A framed image of a fiery volcanic eruption with lava and ash, shown to illustrate the chaotic conditions of the early Earth.
discovered_new_entities.Lightning Storm Image: A framed image of a stormy sky with multiple lightning strikes, used to depict the violent weather of the Hadean Eon.
discovered_new_entities.Hadean Eon Title Card: A dark, atmospheric title card with white text reading 'HADEAN EON' and '4.6 - 4 billion years ago', set against a blurred background of Earth from space.
discovered_new_entities.Molten Earth Image: A framed image of a partially molten Earth with glowing red lava cracks and blue oceans, credited to 'IMAGE BY SIMONE MARCHI', illustrating the early planet's state.

segments.caption: The video opens with the Man in Denim Shirt standing against a dark textured background, speaking directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures. He begins by discussing the Hadean Eon, and an inset image appears to his right labeled 'HADEAN ROCK COLLECTION SITE,' showing a red, layered desert rock formation with sparse vegetation, credited to R. Buick / Univ. of Washington. As he continues, the inset changes to a framed image of a molten Earth with glowing red lava cracks and blue oceans, credited to Simone Marchi, illustrating the planet's early chaotic state. The scene transitions to a full-screen title card for the 'ARCHEAN EON' (4–2.5 billion years ago), set against a dark, starry background with a timeline on the left. The Man in Denim Shirt reappears, and the video cuts to a wide animated prehistoric landscape with volcanic mountains and a shallow sea filled with stromatolite-like structures. This is followed by a close-up of layered rock labeled 'STROMATOLITE FOSSILS IN GLACIER NATIONAL PARK,' credited to James St. John, then another image of stromatolites in Western Australia, credited to Ruth Ellison. The speaker returns, gesturing as he explains, and an inset of glowing green microbial colonies appears. The video then transitions to a full-screen title card for the 'PROTEROZOIC EON' (2.5 billion years ago – 541 million years ago), set against a deep green underwater scene with light rays penetrating the water, suggesting ancient marine life. The timeline remains visible on the left, and the scene fades into the underwater environment, emphasizing the era's aquatic evolution.

active_entities.Man in Denim Shirt: A man with short hair, wearing a dark denim shirt over a white t-shirt, standing against a dark textured background, using expressive hand gestures while speaking. He appears in multiple segments, sometimes full-body, sometimes mid-shot, consistently engaging with the camera.
active_entities.Molten Earth Image: A framed image of a partially molten Earth with glowing red lava cracks and blue oceans, credited to 'IMAGE BY SIMONE MARCHI', illustrating the early planet's state, shown to the right of the speaker.
active_entities.Prehistoric Landscape with Dinosaurs: A wide animated scene of a volcanic landscape with mountains, a shallow sea, and numerous stromatolite-like structures, serving as a visual representation of the Archean Eon.
active_entities.Underwater Prehistoric Scene: An animated deep-sea environment with greenish hues, light rays penetrating from above, and floating particles, serving as the background for the Proterozoic Eon title card and transition.

discovered_new_entities.Hadean Rock Collection Site: A framed image of a red, layered desert rock formation with sparse vegetation, labeled 'HADEAN ROCK COLLECTION SITE' and credited to R. Buick / Univ. of Washington, shown to the right of the speaker.
discovered_new_entities.Archean Eon Title Card: A dark, atmospheric title card with white text reading 'ARCHEAN EON' and '4 - 2.5 billion years ago', set against a blurred background with a timeline on the left listing eons and eras.
discovered_new_entities.Stromatolite Fossils in Glacier National: A close-up image of layered, colorful rock with wavy patterns, labeled 'STROMATOLITE FOSSILS IN GLACIER NATIONAL PARK' and credited to James St. John, shown in a white-bordered frame.
discovered_new_entities.Stromatolites in Western Australia: A photograph of rounded, grayish stromatolite structures in shallow water, labeled 'STROMATOLITES IN WESTERN AUSTRALIA' and credited to Ruth Ellison, shown in a white-bordered frame.
discovered_new_entities.Glowing Microbial Colonies Inset: A framed image of numerous green, glowing circular shapes resembling microbial colonies, shown to the right of the speaker as he discusses early life.
discovered_new_entities.Proterozoic Eon Title Card: A full-screen title card with white text 'PROTEROZOIC EON' and '2.5 billion years ago – 541 million years ago', set against a deep green underwater scene with light rays, with a timeline on the left.

segments.caption: The video begins with an animated depiction of eukaryotic cells in a blue, ethereal environment, showing a single cell dividing into two, with the label 'EUKARYOTES' displayed in the lower-left corner. The scene transitions to the Man in Denim Shirt, who stands against a dark textured background, gesturing with his hands as he speaks. He is then shown alongside a fossil image labeled 'CHARNIA', followed by another fossil labeled 'DICKINSONIA', both credited to Verisimilus at English Wikipedia. The video cuts to a timeline graphic highlighting the 'PHANEROZOIC EON' (541 million years ago – present), which then expands to show the full geological timeline including the Cenozoic, Mesozoic, Paleozoic, Proterozoic, Archean, and Hadean Eons. The scene shifts to lush green ferns in a forest, then to a prehistoric landscape with dinosaurs, and finally to a modern cityscape with people and trams. The Man in Denim Shirt reappears, gesturing with both hands raised, as the timeline is displayed again. The video then shows a dramatic prehistoric scene with dinosaurs, overlaid with the word 'ERAS' in large white letters. The final frame displays the 'PALEOZOIC ERA' title card (541–252 million years ago) against a blurred background of the prehistoric scene, with the timeline still visible on the left.

active_entities.Man in Denim Shirt: A man with short hair, wearing a dark denim shirt over a white t-shirt, standing against a dark textured background, using expressive hand gestures while speaking. He appears in multiple segments, sometimes full-body, sometimes mid-shot, consistently engaging with the camera.

active_entities.Prehistoric Landscape with Dinosaurs: A wide animated scene of a volcanic landscape with mountains, a shallow sea, and numerous stromatolite-like structures, serving as a visual representation of the Archean Eon.

discovered_new_entities.Charnia Fossil Image: A framed fossil image of a segmented, leaf-like organism labeled 'CHARNIA', credited to Verisimilus at English Wikipedia, shown against a dark background.
discovered_new_entities.Dickinsonia Fossil Image: A framed fossil image of a fan-shaped, ribbed organism labeled 'DICKINSONIA', credited to Verisimilus at English Wikipedia, shown against a dark background.

discovered_new_entities.ERAS Title Card: A large, bold white text 'ERAS' overlaid on a dramatic animated scene of dinosaurs in a misty, prehistoric landscape.
discovered_new_entities.Paleozoic Era Title Card: A dark title card with white text reading 'PALEOZOIC ERA' and '541–252 million years ago', set against a blurred background of the prehistoric dinosaur scene, with the geological timeline visible on the left.

segments.caption: The video begins with a title card for the 'Paleozoic Era' (541–252 million years ago), displayed over a dark, textured background with a geological timeline on the left. The scene transitions to the 'Man in Denim Shirt' standing against a dark, fossil-etched backdrop, speaking expressively with his hands clasped and then gesturing outward. The word 'explosion' appears in glowing purple text as he speaks, followed by an animated underwater scene depicting prehistoric marine life, including a large, segmented creature with claws and spiny organisms, swimming over a coral-like seabed. The video then cuts to a title card for the 'Proterozoic Eon' (2.5 billion years ago – 541 million years ago), set against a deep green underwater environment with light rays. The speaker reappears, now discussing the Precambrian, with a timeline listing the Proterozoic, Archean, and Hadean Eons to his right. He continues to gesture while explaining, then the scene shifts to another animated underwater environment with trilobite-like creatures, sponges, and a fossil image of a trilobite appears in a white-bordered inset. The animation continues with more diverse marine life, including a nautiloid and a shark-like creature, swimming among colorful coral and tube worms. The speaker returns, now with two inset images to his right: a fossilized trilobite and a green, segmented creature labeled 'COOKSONIA IMAGE BY SMITH609'. He concludes the segment with hands clasped, maintaining eye contact with the camera.

active_entities.Man in Denim Shirt: A man with short hair, wearing a dark denim shirt over a white t-shirt, standing against a dark textured background, using expressive hand gestures while speaking. He appears in multiple segments, sometimes full-body, sometimes mid-shot, consistently engaging with the camera.

active_entities.Fossil Images Stack: A vertical stack of three fossil images—trilobites, ammonites, and another trilobite—each in a white-bordered frame, separated by dotted lines, shown to the right of the speaker.

discovered_new_entities.Cooksonia Image: A framed image of a green, segmented, worm-like creature labeled 'COOKSONIA IMAGE BY SMITH609', shown to the right of the speaker during the discussion of early life forms.

segments.caption: The video opens with a close-up of fossilized footprints in cracked, reddish-brown sedimentary rock, labeled 'FOSSILIZED FOOTPRINTS' with credit to Miquel Crusafont Catalan Institute of Palaeontology. The scene transitions to a view of Earth from space, showcasing continents and oceans against a starry background. The Man in Denim Shirt appears, standing against a dark textured backdrop, speaking with expressive hand gestures. As he talks, three illustrations of prehistoric reptiles by Nobu Tamura appear to his right. The video then cuts to an animated scene of a Dimetrodon with a vibrant sail, followed by an underwater scene of trilobites swimming among coral-like formations. The Man in Denim Shirt reappears, and the text 'THE GREAT DYING' appears in bold white letters beside him. A map highlights the Falkland Islands (Islas Malvinas) in the Scotia Sea, followed by an aerial view of the Siberian Traps, labeled accordingly. The Man in Denim Shirt returns, and a vertical geological timeline appears to his left, listing the Hadean, Archean, Proterozoic, Paleozoic, Mesozoic, and Cenozoic eons with their respective time spans. The timeline remains visible as he continues speaking, emphasizing the vastness of geological time.

active_entities.Man in Denim Shirt: A man with short hair, wearing a dark denim shirt over a white t-shirt, standing against a dark textured background, using expressive hand gestures while speaking. discovered_new_entities.Prehistoric Reptile Illustrations: Three illustrations of prehistoric reptiles by Nobu Tamura, displayed vertically to the right of the speaker: a gray striped reptile, a greenish-yellow reptile, and a dark gray reptile with a long tail.
discovered_new_entities.Dimetrodon Animation: An animated Dimetrodon with a large, colorful sail, standing on a rocky outcrop in a prehistoric landscape with ferns and a misty background.

discovered_new_entities.Siberian Traps: An aerial photograph of a rugged, green and gray mountainous landscape with patches of snow, labeled 'SIBERIAN TRAPS'.
discovered_new_entities.THE GREAT DYING Title Card: Bold white text reading 'THE GREAT DYING' appearing to the right of the Man in Denim Shirt, emphasizing a major extinction event.
discovered_new_entities.Falkland Islands Map: A detailed map showing the Falkland Islands (Islas Malvinas) in the Scotia Sea, with geographical labels and a red circle highlighting the islands.
discovered_new_entities.Siberian Traps Image: An aerial photograph of a mountainous, vegetated landscape with snow patches, labeled 'SIBERIAN TRAPS', illustrating a major volcanic region linked to the Great Dying.

segments.caption: The video begins with the Man in Denim Shirt standing against a dark textured background, speaking expressively with hand gestures. A vertical geological timeline appears on the left, listing eons and eras from the Hadean Eon to the Phanerozoic Eon, with time spans noted. The scene transitions to a title card reading 'MESOZOIC ERA 252 - 66 million years ago' over a smoky, dark background. This is followed by animated scenes: a large sauropod dinosaur walking along a beach with a smaller dinosaur nearby, then a pterosaur flying over a green landscape, and finally a T. rex in a dynamic pose. The video cuts to a museum display of a T. rex skeleton, then back to the Man in Denim Shirt, who continues speaking. He gestures toward a vertical stack of four small images on the right: a shrew-like mammal, a green frog, a bee, and yellow flowers. The timeline reappears, and the video transitions to a bold title card: 'CRETACEOUS-PALEOGENE EXTINCTION EVENT'. This is followed by an animated scene of a massive asteroid streaking through space toward Earth, glowing with fire and leaving a trail of smoke. The Man in Denim Shirt reappears, gesturing as he speaks, then the video shows a wide shot of a desert rock formation labeled 'CRETACEOUS-PALEOGENE BOUNDARY', with layered sedimentary rock and sparse vegetation under a cloudy sky.

segments.caption: The video opens with a dramatic animated scene of a massive asteroid glowing as it descends through Earth's atmosphere, trailing fire and smoke, set against a backdrop of clouds and stars, visually representing the Cretaceous-Paleogene extinction event. This transitions to a map highlighting the Yucatán Peninsula with a red circle marking the Chicxulub Crater, emphasizing the impact site. The scene shifts to animated prehistoric creatures: a pterosaur gliding over a forest, followed by a Stegosaurus walking through a misty landscape, and then a long-necked sauropod moving across a plain with mountains in the background. The video then cuts to the Man in Denim Shirt standing against a dark textured background, speaking expressively with hand gestures. To his right, an inset image of colorful birds in flight appears briefly. As he continues, a vertical geological timeline appears on the left, listing eons and eras from the Hadean to the Phanerozoic, with time spans. He gestures toward the timeline, emphasizing the Cenozoic Era, which is then highlighted with a full-screen title card reading 'CENOZOIC ERA 66 million years ago - present' over a smoky, dark background. The scene transitions to a lush, vibrant jungle with a stream and dense foliage, then to a dark, underwater prehistoric scene with light rays penetrating the water, before returning to the Man in Denim Shirt, who continues his explanation with animated hand movements, maintaining eye contact with the camera.

active_entities.Man in Denim Shirt: A man with short hair, wearing a dark denim shirt over a white t-shirt, standing against a dark textured background, using expressive hand gestures while speaking. He appears in multiple segments, sometimes full-body, sometimes mid-shot, consistently engaging with the camera.
active_entities.Asteroid Impact Animation: An animated scene of a massive asteroid burning brightly as it enters Earth's atmosphere, trailing fire and smoke, viewed from space with Earth's curvature and clouds below.
active_entities.Pterosaur: A large flying reptile with a long beak and membranous wings, soaring over a dense green forest.
active_entities.Geological Timeline: A full-screen animated timeline with horizontal bars labeled 'EONS', 'ERAS', 'PERIODS', 'EPOCHS', and 'AGES', color-coded and spanning from 4.6 billion years ago to the present day. It appears first as an inset, then as a full-screen graphic.
active_entities.Underwater Prehistoric Scene: An animated deep-sea environment with greenish hues, light rays penetrating from above, and floating particles, serving as the background for the Proterozoic Eon title card and transition.

discovered_new_entities.Map of Yucatán Peninsula: A map highlighting the Yucatán Peninsula with a red circle marking the Chicxulub Crater, labeled with text indicating the location of the impact site.
discovered_new_entities.Stegosaurus Animation: An animated Stegosaurus with a row of plates along its back, walking through a misty, forested landscape with a dark, cloudy sky.
discovered_new_entities.Sauropod Animation: An animated long-necked dinosaur with a textured gray body and a row of spines along its back, walking across a plain with mountains in the background.
discovered_new_entities.CENOZOIC ERA Title Card: A full-screen title card with white text 'CENOZOIC ERA' and '66 million years ago - present', set against a smoky, dark background with a faint timeline on the left.
discovered_new_entities.Lush Jungle Scene: A vibrant, dense jungle with a small stream flowing over moss-covered rocks, surrounded by large trees and lush green foliage, with sunlight filtering through the canopy.

segments.caption: The video opens with the Man in Denim Shirt standing against a dark textured background, speaking expressively with his hands clasped or gesturing. As he speaks, a series of framed illustrations appear to his right: a blue whale, a small rodent, a bat, and a hominid, suggesting a discussion on diverse species. The scene transitions to a full-screen view of Earth from space, centered on Antarctica, emphasizing the planet’s icy continent. This shifts to a framed illustration of a prehistoric grassland with a herd of Mesohippus, labeled with the artist’s name, Heinrich Harder. The speaker reappears, now with a framed image of a fossilized skull labeled 'SAHELANTHROPUS' to his right, accompanied by the text '***PROBABLY? EXPERTS DISAGREE ABOUT THE FIRST BIPEDAL PRIMATE.' A small, stylized Earth model appears to his left, showing green landmasses and blue oceans. The video then cuts to a vivid illustration of a woolly mammoth in a snowy landscape with flying birds and distant mountains. This is followed by a lioness walking through a dry savanna, then a scene of a prehistoric human running alongside hyenas in a dusty, grassy plain. The speaker returns, continuing his narration with hands clasped, maintaining the same dark background throughout.

active_entities.Man in Denim Shirt: A man with short hair, wearing a dark denim shirt over a white t-shirt, standing against a dark textured background, using expressive hand gestures while speaking. He appears in multiple segments, sometimes full-body, sometimes mid-shot, consistently engaging with the camera.

discovered_new_entities.Mesohippus Illustration: A framed illustration of a herd of small, spotted, horse-like animals running through tall grass, labeled 'MESOHIPPUS' and credited to Heinrich Harder.
discovered_new_entities.Sahelanthropus Fossil Skull: A framed image of a fossilized hominid skull, labeled 'SAHELANTHROPUS', with on-screen text stating '***PROBABLY? EXPERTS DISAGREE ABOUT THE FIRST BIPEDAL PRIMATE.'

discovered_new_entities.Woolly Mammoth Illustration: A detailed illustration of a woolly mammoth with long, curved tusks standing in a snowy landscape with pine trees and mountains, birds flying overhead.
discovered_new_entities.Prehistoric Human and Hyenas Illustratio: An animated scene of a bare-chested, dark-skinned prehistoric human running through tall grass alongside two hyenas in a dusty, arid landscape.

segments.caption: The video opens with the Man in Denim Shirt speaking directly to the camera against a dark, textured background, using expressive hand gestures to emphasize his points. The scene transitions to a dramatic animated sequence of a T. rex in a prehistoric, misty environment with sparks flying, followed by a real-world shot of a logging operation with a red forklift moving logs in a mountainous area. The video then cuts to an aerial view of a modern cityscape at night, with light trails from vehicles on a highway, before shifting to a daytime shot of a green tractor plowing a field under a cloudy sky. The Man in Denim Shirt reappears, now with a vertical geological timeline graphic on the left side of the screen listing eons and eras from the Hadean Eon to the present. The scene transitions to a deep blue underwater animated background with the word 'EONS' in large white letters, featuring swimming fish and a shark. The Man in Denim Shirt returns, and the text 'YOUTUBE.COM/EONS' appears on screen. A small inset appears in the top left corner showing a woman with dark hair, labeled 'BRAINCRAFT', as the Man in Denim Shirt gestures toward it. The video concludes with a full-screen credits sequence over the underwater background, listing production roles, image sources, and social media handles for the EONS show, with the PBS Digital Studios logo visible in the top left corner.

segments.caption: The video segment displays a full-screen credits sequence for the show 'EONS' by PBS Digital Studios. The background is a deep blue underwater scene, featuring a large shark swimming slowly from right to left across the lower portion of the frame, with smaller fish gliding in the mid-ground and faint light rays penetrating from above, creating a serene and immersive aquatic atmosphere. The credits are presented in white text on the left side of the screen, listing production roles such as Executive Producer Hank Green, Co-Producer and Host Blake de Pastino, Director Nick Jenkins, and others, along with contributors like Seth Radley (Video Editor, Animator) and Mark Olsen (Main Titles, Animator). The credits also acknowledge Synema Studios for sound mixing and design, and list image sources including Miquel Crusafont Catalan Institute of Palaeontology, Ruth Ellison, Verisimilus, Smith609, Ixandreani, and Charles R Knight. The music is credited to APM. On the right side, social media handles for the show are displayed: @EONSSHOW on Twitter and Instagram, and /EONSSHOW on Facebook, each accompanied by their respective platform icons. The PBS Digital Studios logo is visible in the top left corner, maintaining brand consistency. The overall tone is calm and professional, with the gentle movement of marine life providing a subtle, engaging backdrop to the static text.
